title: Outbox Pattern — Polling vs CDC
description: Compares Approach A (polling) and Approach B (Debezium CDC) for the outbox pattern demo in outbox-pattern/. Only one mode is ever running at a time; run the Gatling load test against each in turn to compare.

panels.title: Event Latency (p50 / p95) by Mode
panels.description: End-to-end latency from outbox row creation (Postgres commit) to consumer receipt, tagged by publishing mode. This is the star metric for comparing polling vs CDC.

panels.title: Event Throughput by Mode
panels.description: Events delivered per second, tagged by mode. Reuses the latency Timer's own count series rather than a separate counter.

panels.title: Polling Backlog (PENDING outbox events)
panels.description: Polling mode only — this bean doesn't exist under the CDC profile, so expect "No data" when running --profile cdc. That's correct: CDC never updates outbox row status (WAL is the source of truth).

panels.title: Avg Latency by Topic & Mode
panels.description: Per-event-type latency breakdown (registration vs profile update vs KYC update), split by mode.

targets.expr: sum(outbox_event_latency_seconds_sum) by (mode, topic) / sum(outbox_event_latency_seconds_count) by (mode, topic)
